chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-164 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 23.09.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** On 02.09.2025, following order was passed:- “None present for the petitioner, nor any intimation received. Respondent No.4, Mukhtiarkar Taluka Kandiaro, is present in-person along with record pertaining to the application of the petitioner pending before him. The matter is adjourned to 23.09.2025. Let notice be issued to the petitioner as well as intimation notice to his counsel for the next date of hearing” Despite issuance of notice to the petitioner directly as well as to his counsel, today none of them is in attendance nor any intimation received. Record reflects that the present Constitution Petition has been pending since 2023 without any progress, and no sincere efforts have been made by the petitioner to proceed with the matter. It appears that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in pursuing the instant petition. Accordingly, the present Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
